## Bases de datos

### mycli

<img style="width: 340px;" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dbcli/mycli/master/screenshots/main.gif">

> Un cliente alternativo de mySQL con compleción de código y tablas.

[Github](https://github.com/dbcli/mycli/)

<details>
<summary>Compatibility</summary>
<img style="width: 25px;" src="../IMAGES/floss.png">
<img style="width: 25px;" src="../IMAGES/console.png">
<img style="width: 25px;" src="../IMAGES/linux.png">
</details>

## nocodb

<img style="width: 340px;" src="https://cdn.nocodb.com/marketing-site/20260212161204/images/Grid-View-p-2000.png">

> NocoDB allows building no-code database solutions with ease of spreadsheets. Bring your own database or choose ours! Millions of rows? Not a problem. Your Data. Your rules. You are in control.

[Github](https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb)

[Homepage](https://nocodb.com)

<details>
<summary>Compatibility</summary>
<img style="width: 25px;" src="../IMAGES/floss.png">
<img style="width: 25px;" src="../IMAGES/docker.png">
<img style="width: 25px;" src="../IMAGES/linux.png">
</details>

## sqall

<img style="width: 340px;" src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/2895418/419545956-ecac6ac3-4d42-4d3d-9c15-2e129102a087.gif?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..cZiT2d_il3TlmbbLIbk7xUIunyTwTzpyuTf4SXbvyjc">

> Squall is a SQLite viewer and editor that runs in your terminal. Squall is written in Python and uses the Textual package

[Github](https://github.com/driscollis/squall)

<details>
<summary>Compatibility</summary>
<img style="width: 25px;" src="../IMAGES/linux.png">
<img style="width: 25px;" src="../IMAGES/console.png">
</details>
